dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8162 IH: Regulatory Review Improvement Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Meuser (for himself, Mr. Bresnahan, and Ms. King-Hinds) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Small Business, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, to make certain modifications to how agencies conduct periodic reviews of agency rules, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Regulatory Review Improvement Act of 2026.

section.header: Changes to periodic review of rules
section.text: Section 610 of title 5, United States Code, is amended—

clause.text: by striking and for the review and inserting , for the review; and
by inserting before the period at the end the following: , and for the solicitation of public comments on whether each such final rule should remain in effect; and
by inserting that includes an explanation for the delay after in a statement; and
by striking by one year at a time for a total of not more than five years and inserting by not more than one year;

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (2), by inserting , including any analyses or summaries conducted by the agency under subsection (c) before the semicolon at the end;
in paragraph (4), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (5), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: the cost of compliance and the number of paperwork hours the rule has required since the rule took effect.

clause.text: by striking and the need for and inserting , the need for; and
by inserting , and an economic analysis of such rule, after such rule; and

subparagraph.text: by adding at the end the following new sentence: Before conducting a review under this section, each agency shall produce a qualitative and quantitative summary of such comments that includes an analysis of such comments by the agency..
